title: Wildlife Whodunit

source.name: Treasure Vault - Murder mystery, but about death of an animal

hook: Inspect habitat clues in a non-graphic wildlife mystery, identify predator, disease, poison, or accident, then accuse the right ecological culprit before actions run out.
mechanic: Tap-driven deduction puzzle. The player spends limited field actions on clue sites, reads evidence cards, chooses one of four causes and one ecological culprit, and advances through six increasingly tricky habitat cases.

dedupe.notes: Adjacent Treasure Vault build 229_trailcam_ranger is wildlife observation and camera placement. This game is a deduction/report loop with limited clue actions and cause/culprit accusation.
